name: paper-distill-mcp
description: MCP server for academic paper search across 9 sources (OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, PubMed, arXiv, Papers with Code, CrossRef, Europe PMC, bioRxiv, DBLP) with AI-powered curation, ranked push to Telegram/Discord/Feishu/WeCom, and Zotero/Obsidian integration.

OPENALEX_EMAIL.description: Email for OpenAlex polite pool (higher rate limits)

CORE_API_KEY.description: CORE API key for open-access paper retrieval

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token for paper delivery

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID for paper delivery

DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Discord webhook URL for paper delivery

ZOTERO_LIBRARY_ID.description: Zotero user ID for saving papers

ZOTERO_API_KEY.description: Zotero API key for saving papers

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search academic papers across 9 sources with deduplication and merged ranking

tools.name: rank_papers
tools.description: Score and rank papers using 4-factor weighted formula (relevance, recency, impact, novelty)

tools.name: filter_duplicates
tools.description: Remove papers already pushed by DOI match against history

tools.name: generate_digest
tools.description: Generate formatted paper digest output for a given date

tools.name: send_push
tools.description: Push paper digest to Telegram, Discord, Feishu, or WeCom

tools.name: collect_to_zotero
tools.description: Save selected papers to Zotero library with metadata and PDF

tools.name: manage_topics
tools.description: Add, remove, or list research topic preferences

tools.name: ingest_research_context
tools.description: Ingest research context from user descriptions to configure topics

tools.name: init_session
tools.description: Initialize a new paper distill session with configuration

tools.name: load_session_context
tools.description: Load existing session context and state

tools.name: setup
tools.description: Interactive first-run setup wizard for the server

tools.name: add_topic
tools.description: Add a new research topic with keywords and weight

tools.name: pool_refresh
tools.description: Refresh the paper candidate pool by searching all topics

tools.name: prepare_review
tools.description: Prepare paper candidates for human review

tools.name: collect
tools.description: Collect selected papers to Zotero and/or Obsidian

tools.name: prepare_summarize
tools.description: Prepare selected papers for AI summarization
